web_results.title: Why Liverpool Will Win the 2025-26 Premier League and Why Arsenal and Man City Won't
web_results.description: It’s time for Liverpool to defend the Premier League title. The English champions blew prospective contenders away last season, finishing 10 points clear of second-place Arsenal, 13 ahead of previous winners Manchester City and 15 beyond Chelsea in fourth.

web_results.title: VOTE: Who will win the Premier League title?
web_results.description: Chelsea dropped two points after Burnley's Zian Flemming netted a stoppage-time equaliser at Stamford Bridge, while Liverpool also needed a late goal from Alexis Mac Allister to win 1-0 at Nottingham Forest.

web_results.title: English Premier League Winner Predictions & Odds | Polymarket
web_results.description: Propose resolutionThis is a polymarket on whether the listed club will win the 2025–26 English Premier League. This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed club is officially crowned the winner of the 2025–26 English Premier League. Otherwise, it will resolve to "No".
